title: This Dedham resident is running Boston for suicide prevention
author: Carson Lyle
bullets: Why I'm Running "When I finally spot the iconic Citgo sign in Kenmore Square, I will know he's still right there with me, cheering me on through those final steps," Holman said.
Russell Holman is running the 2026 Boston Marathon.

title: Hillary and Bill Clinton cheer on daughter Chelsea at the marathon finish line
author: Beth Treffeisen
bullets: Boston Marathon Chelsea Clinton, running under the pseudonym Margaret Smith, completed her first Boston Marathon.
Former President Bill Clinton embraces his daughter Chelsea Clinton behind the finish line of the Boston Marathon Monday.

(Jessica Rinaldi/Globe Staff) Former President Bill Clinton and former Secretary of State Hillary Clinton cheered on their daughter at the Boston Marathon on Monday, greeting Chelsea Clinton at the finish line after she completed the 26.

title: Paul Pierce roasts 76ers, questions whether series is worth his time
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Boston Celtics "When I saw Sixers-Celtics I was like - I usually go to the Celtics' first round, but I really didn't want to waste that trip because I know.

" Paul Pierce Danielle Parhizkaran/Globe Staff The Celtics and 76ers have met in the playoffs more than any other pair of teams in NBA history, but the last time Philadelphia beat Boston in a series was 44 years ago in the 1982 Eastern Conference Finals.
Boston eliminated Philadelphia twice during Paul Pierce’s career.
